stemHtml: Compared with a clean configuration, a take-off of an aeroplane with a 10-degree flap setting will result in...

options.a: an increased field-length-limited TOM, and a decreased climb-limited TOM.
options.b: a decreased field-length-limited TOM, and a decreased climb-limited TOM.
options.c: an increased field-length-limited TOM, and an increased climb-limited TOM.
options.d: a decreased field-length-limited TOM, and an increased climb-limited TOM.
